offplanDescription:
Embrace a new kind of living in one of Dubai's most coveted districts-JLT.

SOBHA Verde offers stunning views of the green meadows and the golf course. The uber-luxury homes are beautifully designed with world-class amenities. The tower consists of 1-3.5-bedroom apartments ranging from.
developerSummary:
SOBHA Realty redefines the concept of urban luxury living

with a repertoire of real estate projects across Dubai. With a razor-sharp focus on quality and innovation, it has created a plethora of iconic spaces such as extravagant palaces, ornate mosques, cutting-edge campuses and ultra-luxurious communities with grand villas and apartments. Every detail in SOBHA ushers in limitless possibilities of fine living.
propertyExplainer:
Verde by Sobha

features a range of luxurious 1,2 and 3-bedroom apartments. All apartments will come with their own balcony and have a modern design with high floor-to-ceiling windows. Verde is built with high-quality materials as Sobha is well-known for.  

The apartments provide residents with world-class amenities. Including a fitness centre, a temperature-controlled swimming pool, a children’s play area,  green garden. Verde also has a beautifully designed lobby with 24-hour security and concierge services.

locationDescription: Verde by Sobha is located in Jumeirah Lakes Towers (JLT). one of Dubai’s most popular residential and commercial areas. Just a few minutes away are Dubai Marina and Dubai Marina Mall. Verde by Sobha is situated close to Dubai Metro and Sheikh Zayed Road.
